name: Pickled Dilled Okra
recipeInstructions:
Yield: 8 to 9 pints
1. Wash and trim the okra.
2. Fill jars firmly with whole okra, leaving 1/2-inch headspace.
3. Place one garlic clove in each jar.
4. Combine salt, hot peppers, dill seed, water, and vinegar in a large saucepan.
5. Bring to a boil.
6. Pour the hot pickling solution over okra, leaving 1/2-inch headspace.
7. Adjust lids and process according to the recommendations in Table 1.
Table 1. Recommended process time for Pickled Dilled Okra in a boiling-water canner.
Style of Pack: Hot. Jar Size: Pints.
Process Time at Altitudes of 0 - 1,000 ft: 10 minutes
1,001 - 6,000 ft: 15 minutes
Above 6,000 ft: 20 minutes
